creator: sahil@tandon.net
text:
The patch is for 2.6.1, not 2.6.2, in which it is already "included".  I
don't think this is a FreeBSD/ports issue.  I won't have time to debug the
underlying software until this weekend, so you might have better luck
broaching this on the postfix-users mailing list.  Otherwise, I'll configure
a test box with your exact parameters and see if I can reproduce the warning
this weekend.

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net>
